results.title: Sona Mohapatra says all heartbreak songs in Bollywood are ‘reserved for men’, gives example of Arijit Singh's Zaalima
results.description: Sona Mohapatra says she was flabbergasted by the song Zaalima where the female voice only comes in the end and all the rest of the song is for the male singer.

results.title: Eric Bischoff – ‘WWE Isn’t Dying’
results.description: Eric Bischoff thinks fans need to stop acting like WWE is falling apart just because the company isn’t matching the fever pitch it reached around WrestleMania season last year. Speaking on a recent edition of his “83 Weeks” podcast, the former WCW executive agreed that WWE was operating at an incredible level heading into WrestleMania, [...]
